item.title: Code Breakers Corps Guild
item.description: Standing Security Bounties · IP Ledger Stamps · Guild-Class Security Membership. Solve cryptographic puzzles and platform-substrate challenges to earn Marks and permanent IP attribution.

item.title: LB Elves Guild
item.description: Red/Blue Team Competition — Friendly-Cohort Variant. Bushel 25 seed stub. Full competition scoreboard and per-team IP Ledger stamping land in Bushel 27.
